exchanges.prompt: generate an hld of two web app and a loadbalancer

response.content:
loadbalancer[Load Balancer]
webapp1[Web App 1]
webapp2[Web App 2]
user-->|Request|loadbalancer
loadbalancer-->|Route Request|webapp1
loadbalancer-->|Route Request|webapp2
webapp1-->|Response|loadbalancer
webapp2-->|Response|loadbalancer
loadbalancer-->|Response|user
